name: Stateless Hash-Based Digital Signature Standard
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: FIPS 205 (2024) standardizes SLH-DSA (Stateless Hash-Based Digital Signature Algorithm, based on SPHINCS+) — NIST's hash-based PQC signature standard, designed for higher security margin via different mathematical foundation than ML-DSA.
relationToCloudSecurity: Conservative PQC signature for high-assurance cloud use cases.
relationToAISecurity: Same applications as FIPS 204 with stronger security assumptions.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
